description: M28 validation of the M0030 revised grid-pair story.

scenarios.name: noise_none
scenarios.label: V=(0,0)
scenarios.note: No residual noise; strong chi-square higher moments.

scenarios.name: noise_moderate
scenarios.label: V=(0.2,0.2)
scenarios.note: Moderate Gaussian residual noise; strong chi-square higher moments.

scenarios.name: noise_high
scenarios.label: V=(0.5,0.5)
scenarios.note: Lower high Gaussian residual-noise stress case after M0030.

scenarios.name: strong_nongaussianity
scenarios.label: w=1
scenarios.note: Fixed moderate residual noise with strong structural higher moments.

scenarios.name: weak_nongaussianity
scenarios.label: w=0.25
scenarios.note: Fixed moderate residual noise with weakened structural higher moments.

scenarios.name: gaussian_shocks
scenarios.label: w=0
scenarios.note: Fixed moderate residual noise with Gaussian structural shocks.
